zh.Stawell, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特斯塔維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Hody於1430年出生在英國薩默塞特斯塔維爾時，她的父親Sir John Hody34歲，母親Elizabeth Jewe31歲。她於1453年與Robert Bond在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年2月8日在英國多瑟特斯普爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Hody于1430年出生在英国薩默塞特斯塔維爾时，她的父亲Sir John Hody34岁，母亲Elizabeth Jewe31岁。她于1453年与Robert Bond在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年2月8日在英国多瑟特斯普爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech and Slovak (Holý): from holý ‘naked, bare, bald’, thus a nickname denoting either a young, beardless man, a bald or clean-shaven man, or a destitute person.

variants.name: Holley
meanings: nickname from Middle English hol ‘hollow’ + eie, egh(e) ‘eye’ (Old English hol + ēage), perhaps a nickname for someone with a missing eye.
topographic name for someone who lived by a ‘clearing in a hollow’, from Middle English hol ‘hollow’ + lei(e) ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Hula
meanings: Czech (Hůla): nickname from a variant of the adjective holý ‘bald, bare, or clean-shaven’ (see Holy ).
Rusyn (from Poland and Slovakia; in Slovakia spelled Huľa) and Ukrainian: descriptive nickname for someone with a prominent bump or wart, Ukrainian dialect hulya. Compare Gula 1.

variants.name: Holecek
meanings: Czech (Holeček): from a diminutive of holý ‘naked, bare, clean-shaven’ (see Holy ).

variants.name: Hollas
meanings: Czech: from a derivative of holý ‘bald, bare, or clean-shaven’; see Holy .

variants.name: Holan
meanings: Czech: nickname from a derivative of holý ‘naked, bare, or clean-shaven’ (see Holy ).
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms, chiefly in Trøndelag, named with the definite plural form of Old Norse hóll ‘round hill, mound’.

variants.name: Holec
meanings: Czech: nickname for a beardless young man, from a noun derivative of holý ‘naked, bare’ (see Holy ).

variants.name: Holik
meanings: Czech and Slovak (Holík): nickname derived from holý ‘naked, bare, bald’ (see Holy ).

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Hody was born in 1430, in Stawell, Somerset, England, her father, Sir John Hody, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Jewe, was 31. She married Robert Bond in 1453, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 February 1504, in Steeple, Dorset, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Hody est née en 1430, à Stawell, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hody, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Jewe, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Bond en 1453, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 février 1504, à Steeple, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Hody 1430 in Stawell, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hody 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Jewe 31. Sie hat 1453 in Dorset, England Robert Bond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Februar 1504 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Steeple, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Hody è nata il nel 1430 nel Stawell, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir John Hody, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Jewe, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Robert Bond nel 1453, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 febbraio 1504, nel Steeple, Dorset, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Hodyが1430年にイギリスソメルセトスタウエルで生まれた時，父Sir John Hodyは34歳，母Elizabeth Jeweは31歳であった。1453年にイギリスドールセトでRobert Bondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年2月8日にイギリスドールセトスティープルで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Hody(이)가 1430년 영국 서머세트 스타웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hody(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Jewe(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 도르세트에서 Robert Bond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 2월 8일 영국 도르세트 스티프일에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Hody nasceu em 1430, em Stawell, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hody, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Jewe, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Bond em 1453, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1504, em Steeple, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Hody родилась в 1430 г. в местности ставелл, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Hody было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Jewe, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Bond в 1453 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 февраля 1504 г. в местности стипл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Hody nació en 1430, en Stawell, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hody, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Jewe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Robert Bond en 1453, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1504, en Steeple, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
